chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2049 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8049/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.8050/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.8051/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 02.12.2025 Mr. Riaz Hussain Khaskheli, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition and submits that the petitioner will file proper Appeal provided under the law. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
